question: I'm on a Brev instance. Set up the environment and run a GRPO training experiment with checkpoints and W&B logging.
ground_truth: The agent loads the brev-etiquette skill, checks disk space, sets up /ephemeral paths for experiment outputs, loads .env secrets, and configures cache directories before launching.
expected_behavior: The agent read brev-etiquette/SKILL.md before acting
The agent checked disk space with df -h /home/ubuntu/RL /ephemeral
The agent created experiment directories under /ephemeral
The agent set cache environment variables pointing to /ephemeral

question: Download the Qwen 2.5 model from Hugging Face on this Brev machine for an upcoming training run.
ground_truth: The agent loads the brev-etiquette skill, sets HF_HOME and cache paths to /ephemeral, loads HF_TOKEN from .env, and downloads the model to the shared cache root.
expected_behavior: The agent read brev-etiquette/SKILL.md before acting
The agent set HF_HOME to a path under /ephemeral
The agent loaded .env for the HF_TOKEN
The agent used a shared cache root rather than per-experiment cache

question: Run the unit tests for the GRPO algorithm locally on my laptop.
ground_truth: The agent should not activate the brev-etiquette skill when not on a Brev instance.
expected_behavior: The agent did not read or activate brev-etiquette/SKILL.md

question: Deploy the training job to the Kubernetes cluster using nrl-k8s.
ground_truth: The agent should not activate the brev-etiquette skill for a Kubernetes deployment task.
expected_behavior: The agent did not read or activate brev-etiquette/SKILL.md
